Bash(python -c "
import sys, fitz
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
doc = fitz.open\('C:/Firmware Projects/DMF-Motherboard-R1/Datasheets/ADC - LTC2338IMS-18#PBF.pdf'\)
for page_num in range\(min\(12, len\(doc\)\)\):
    page = doc[page_num]
    text = page.get_text\(\)
    lower = text.lower\(\)
    if any\(k in lower for k in ['transfer', 'two', 'complement', 'offset binary', 'vref', 'full scale', 'lsb', 'input range', 'bipolar']\):
        print\(f'\\n--- PAGE {page_num+1} ---'\)
        print\(text[:4000]\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import sys, fitz
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
doc = fitz.open\('C:/Firmware Projects/DMF-Motherboard-R1/Datasheets/USB HUB - USB2517I-JZX.pdf'\)
print\(f'Pages: {len\(doc\)}'\)
for page_num in range\(len\(doc\)\):
    page = doc[page_num]
    text = page.get_text\(\)
    lower = text.lower\(\)
    if any\(k in lower for k in ['smbus', 'slave address', '0x2c', 'cfg_sel', 'reset', 'strap', 'i2c address', 'configuration mode']\):
        print\(f'\\n--- PAGE {page_num+1} ---'\)
        print\(text[:5000]\)
")

import sys, fitz
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
doc = fitz.open\('C:/Firmware Projects/DMF-Motherboard-R1/Datasheets/USB HUB - USB2517I-JZX.pdf'\)
for page_num in range\(len\(doc\)\):

    lower = text.lower\(\)

        print\(f'\\n--- PAGE {page_num+1} ---'\)
        print\(text[:5000]\)
